debug_info.goal:
u : Scalar52
h : u ≠ ZERO
⊢ ∃ m, u.as_montgomery = ok m ∧ Scalar52_as_Nat m ≡ Scalar52_as_Nat u * R [MOD L] ∧ m ≠ ZERO

failed_attempts:
obtain ⟨m, hm_ok, hm_eq⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  refine ⟨m, hm_ok, hm_eq, ?_⟩
  intro hm_zero
  rw [hm_zero] at hm_eq
  simp only [ZERO, Scalar52_as_Nat] at hm_eq
  have : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := hm_eq.symm
  have hR_coprime : Nat.Coprime R L := coprimeRL
  have : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    have h' : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 * R [MOD L] := by simpa using this
    exact cancelR h'
  have : u = ZERO := Scalar52_as_Nat_eq_zero_iff.mp this
  exact h this

obtain ⟨m, hm_ok, hm_spec⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  refine ⟨m, hm_ok, hm_spec, ?_⟩
  intro hm_zero
  rw [hm_zero] at hm_spec
  simp only [ZERO_as_Nat] at hm_spec
  have h1 : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := hm_spec.symm
  have hR_coprime : Nat.Coprime R L := coprimeRL
  have h2 : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 * R [MOD L] := by simpa using h1
    exact cancelR this
  have h3 : Scalar52_as_Nat u = 0 := by
    have hbound := Scalar52_as_Nat_bounded u
    omega
  have h4 : u = ZERO := Scalar52_as_Nat_zero_iff.mp h3
  exact h h4

have ⟨m, hm⟩ := as_montgomery_ok u
  use m
  refine ⟨hm, ?_, ?_⟩
  · exact as_montgomery_spec u m hm
  · intro heq
    apply h
    have := as_montgomery_spec u m hm
    rw [heq] at this
    exact zero_of_montgomery_zero u this

have ⟨m, hm_ok, hm_spec⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  exact ⟨m, hm_ok, hm_spec, as_montgomery_preserves_nonzero u m h hm_ok hm_spec⟩

obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  refine ⟨m, hm.1, hm.2, ?_⟩
  intro hmz
  apply h
  have h1 : Scalar52_as_Nat m ≡ Scalar52_as_Nat u * R [MOD L] := hm.2
  rw [hmz] at h1
  simp only [ZERO_as_Nat] at h1
  have h2 : 0 ≡ Scalar52_as_Nat u * R [MOD L] := h1
  have h3 : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := h2.symm
  have hcoprime : Nat.Coprime R L := coprimeRL
  have h4 : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    have := cancelR (b := 0) (by simpa using h3)
    simpa using this
  exact Scalar52_as_Nat_eq_zero h4

obtain ⟨m, hm_ok, hm_eq⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  refine ⟨m, hm_ok, hm_eq, ?_⟩
  intro hm_zero
  rw [hm_zero] at hm_eq
  simp [ZERO, Scalar52_as_Nat] at hm_eq
  have : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := hm_eq.symm
  have hcoprime : Nat.Coprime R L := coprimeRL
  have hR_pos : R > 0 := by unfold R; norm_num
  have : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    have h1 : 0 * R = 0 := by ring
    rw [← h1] at this
    exact cancelR this
  have hu_zero : Scalar52_as_Nat u % L = 0 := Nat.ModEq.eq_zero_iff_dvd.mp this
  sorry

have ⟨m, hok, hmod⟩ := spec_as_montgomery u
  exact ⟨m, hok, hmod, fun heq => h (as_montgomery_zero_iff.mp ⟨m, hok, heq⟩)⟩

obtain ⟨m, hm_ok, hm_spec⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  refine ⟨m, hm_ok, hm_spec, ?_⟩
  intro hm_zero
  rw [hm_zero] at hm_spec
  simp only [ZERO, Scalar52_as_Nat] at hm_spec
  have h0 : (0 : ℕ) ≡ Scalar52_as_Nat u * R [MOD L] := by
    simpa using hm_spec
  have hL_pos : 0 < L := by unfold L; omega
  have h1 : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := h0.symm
  have hcoprime : Nat.Coprime R L := coprimeRL
  have h2 : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    have := Nat.ModEq.cancel_right_of_coprime (Nat.Coprime.symm hcoprime) 
      (by simpa using h1 : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 * R [MOD L])
    exact this
  have hu_reduced : Scalar52_as_Nat u < L := Scalar52_as_Nat_lt_L u
  have hu_zero : Scalar52_as_Nat u = 0 := by
    have := Nat.eq_zero_of_zero_dvd (Nat.modEq_zero_iff_dvd.mp h2)
    omega
  have : u = ZERO := Scalar52_as_Nat_eq_zero_iff.mp hu_zero
  exact h this

have ⟨m, hok, hspec⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  refine ⟨m, hok, hspec, ?_⟩
  intro heq
  apply h
  rw [heq] at hspec
  simp only [ZERO, Scalar52_as_Nat] at hspec
  sorry

have ⟨m, hm_ok, hm_nat⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  exact ⟨m, hm_ok, hm_nat, as_montgomery_ne_zero_of_ne_zero u m h hm_ok⟩

have ⟨m, hm_ok, hm_spec⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  refine ⟨m, hm_ok, hm_spec, ?_⟩
  intro hm_zero
  apply h
  have h1 : Scalar52_as_Nat m = 0 := by rw [hm_zero]; rfl
  rw [h1] at hm_spec
  simp at hm_spec
  have hcoprime : Nat.Coprime R L := coprimeRL
  have h2 : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    have h3 : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := hm_spec
    have h4 : 0 * R = 0 := by ring
    rw [← h4] at h3
    exact cancelR h3
  sorry

obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  use m
  refine ⟨hm.1, hm.2, ?_⟩
  intro hzero
  rw [hzero] at hm
  simp only [ZERO_as_Nat] at hm
  have : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := hm.2.symm
  have hR : Nat.Coprime R L := coprimeRL
  have hu_zero : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    have h' : 0 * R ≡ Scalar52_as_Nat u * R [MOD L] := by simp [this.symm]
    exact cancelR h'.symm
  have : u = ZERO := Scalar52_eq_ZERO_of_as_Nat_eq_zero_mod_L u hu_zero
  exact h this

obtain ⟨m, hm⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  exact ⟨m, hm.1, hm.2, fun hzero => h (as_montgomery_zero_iff.mp ⟨m, hm.1, hzero⟩)⟩

obtain ⟨m, hm_ok, hm_spec⟩ := as_montgomery_spec u
  refine ⟨m, hm_ok, hm_spec, ?_⟩
  intro hm_zero
  apply h
  have hm_nat : Scalar52_as_Nat m = 0 := by
    simp only [hm_zero, ZERO_spec]
  rw [hm_nat] at hm_spec
  simp only [zero_eq, mul_zero] at hm_spec
  have hcoprime : Nat.Coprime R L := coprimeRL
  have h1 := Nat.Coprime.symm hcoprime
  have hmod : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 [MOD L] := hm_spec.symm
  have hmod' : Scalar52_as_Nat u ≡ 0 [MOD L] := by
    have : Scalar52_as_Nat u * R ≡ 0 * R [MOD L] := by simp [hmod]
    exact cancelR this
  exact ZERO_spec_inv u hmod'
